$comment: ProofGate config — every key is optional. Drop this at your repo root as proofgate.json. Without it, ProofGate auto-detects your stack (pnpm/npm/yarn/bun, Cargo, Go, Python, Gradle/Maven, .NET, Ruby, PHP, Elixir, Deno). Read with jq, node, or python3 — whichever exists (zero hard dependency).

coupledFiles.reason: the embedded dev schema and the production SQL mirror must move together

$comment_guards: Turn a guard off, downgrade/upgrade its severity, or add repo-local guards. Guard names are the file name without the NN- prefix.
$comment_secrets: Extra escape hatches for the secrets guard: regexes to allow, plus the always-available inline `proofgate-allow` comment and the .proofgateignore fingerprint file.
$comment_smoke: Production smoke run only under --smoke. Each entry is a GET (url + optional status/expect-body-regex) OR a command (cmd, exit 0 = pass). Never put a real credential in url/headers — use a cmd that reads it from the environment.
$comment_hooks: The plugin's push-guard (PreToolUse) refuses `git push` without a fresh passing verdict; set pushGuard:false to disable. stopGuard (opt-in, default off) makes the Stop hook refuse 'done' without one.
